headlines.title: US ends deportation protections (TPS) for Haitians and Syrians

headlines.snippet: Despite ongoing ceasefires and shifting battlefronts, Israel's conflicts continue without achieving clear objectives or lasting security. The cycle of war shows no sign of ending.

headlines.snippet: Israeli forces have demolished homes and are continuing a military operation in southern Lebanon. Reports indicate troops bulldozed and burned houses, and air strikes resulted in casualties.
